title: Fig. 2 in Besnoitia tarandi in Canadian woodland caribou - Isolation, characterization and suitability for serological tests
author: Schares, Gereon
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Fig. 2. Growth of Besnoitia besnoiti Bb-EvoraCl2 (triangles) and Besnoitia tarandi Bt-CA-Quebec1 (crosses) as assessed by real-time PCR on in-vitro cultivated MARC-145 cells 24, 48 or 72 h p.i. Linear regression revealed that B. tarandi BtCA-Quebec1 grew faster than B. besnoiti BbEvoraCl2.
